title: Cobblemon Global SMP
description: Official modpack for the Cobblemon Global SMP. A grand Cobblemon adventure awaits for you on the newest Minecraft with a public SMP server for you to enjoy! Also includes a well rounded suite of client side optimization mods and QoL features.
body:
**Welcome to the Cobblemon Global SMP!** This is the official modpack for the SMP, featuring an early snapshot of the new Cobblmon update.

A grand Cobblemon adventure awaits for you in our well tailored modpack that covers
- **Optimizations** (Tested suite of client side optimization mods)
- **Visual Improvements** (Shaders, Minimap w/ Pokemon icons, and other visuals added.)
- **Pre-configured** (Resolved keybind conflicts, Pokemon icons and biome name on the minimap)
- **Multiplayer** (Official Public SMP server pre-included in the modpack)

**This modpack includes an early version of Cobblemon 1.6, which is licensed under MPL-2.0 and the source code can be found** [here](https://github.com/EVNT-Dev/mchub-cobblemon).

![SMP Spawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e07b410ba84a6889e06fcbe9c6c538fc57d1ff27.png)
